scripts.test:backend: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --project apps/mcp-api pytest -q apps/mcp-api/tests
scripts.test:backend:runtime: RUN_RUNTIME_E2E_CELERY=1 MEMORY_BACKEND=falkordb KV_BACKEND=redis QUEUE_BACKEND=celery UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --project apps/mcp-api pytest -q apps/mcp-api/tests/test_runtime_e2e_celery.py apps/mcp-api/tests/test_runtime_backends.py
scripts.validate:web: pnpm --dir apps/web typecheck && pnpm --dir apps/web lint && pnpm --dir apps/web build
scripts.validate:release: pnpm validate:docs && pnpm validate:web && pnpm test:backend
